name: Chinese Chicken Livers
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Chicken livers, cut into half
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine lemon juice and soy sauce in a bowl.
2. Pour the mixture over the chicken livers and refrigerate overnight.
3. Drain the livers and dredge them in flour.
4. Heat oil in a wok.
5. Fry the livers and onions together until the livers are golden brown.
